contact.title: Let's get in touch
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaborations or just to say hi!

templateNotice.iconTooltip: This site is available as a template
templateNotice.dialogTitle: This portfolio site is available as a template
templateNotice.dialogDescription: You can find the repository designed to be easily duplicated and customized to create your own portfolio. You can modify the content files to adapt the texts, projects, skills and experiences. By keeping your portfolio up to date, you can easily maintain and export your resume for recruiters. A guide is included in the repository to facilitate deploying the site via GitHub Pages.

exportView.attribution: This resume was exported from my personal portfolio website: {link}
